audio.name: Sonic Pro Wireless G2
audio.description: Sleek black wireless headphones with metallic finish

reviews.title: Best Audio Quality
reviews.text: The spatial awareness in FPS games is incredible. I can hear exactly where footsteps are coming from. Highly recommend.
reviews.name: John D.

reviews.title: Comfy for Long Sessions
reviews.text: Super lightweight and the ear cups don't get hot. Battery life easily lasts my entire weekend gaming sessions.
reviews.name: Sarah M.

reviews.title: Mic clarity is insane
reviews.text: My teammates noticed the difference immediately. It sounds like I'm using a studio microphone. Worth every penny.
reviews.name: Alex K.

reviews.title: Great Build Quality
reviews.text: Solid construction, premium feel, and the headband is super comfortable. Easily the best headset I've owned.
reviews.name: Michael R.

audio.name: HyperX Cloud Alpha Wireless
audio.description: Wireless gaming headset with legendary comfort and 300‑hour battery life.

reviews.title: Insane battery life
reviews.text: I charged it once and it lasted me almost two weeks of daily gaming.
reviews.name: Kevin L.

reviews.title: Super comfortable
reviews.text: The ear cushions are soft and breathable. Zero fatigue after long sessions.
reviews.name: Maria S.

audio.name: SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro
audio.description: Premium multi‑platform headset with active noise cancellation.

reviews.title: Studio‑grade sound

reviews.title: ANC is amazing
reviews.text: Blocks out everything. Great for noisy environments.
